problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: The key to Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? is Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing — specifically Fear memory reconsolidation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.
